meta.description: Machine-readable summary of the Windows PC backend + Cloudflare edge. Not loaded by production runtime; for operators, agents, and validation tooling.

os.note: Build 22631+ is Windows 11-era; verify with `winver` on the host if this drifts.

ssh.access: Cloudflare Access + cloudflared access ssh (see docs/SERVER_MANAGEMENT.md)

postgresql.namingNote: Compose may use a **service** name (e.g. `entitlement-db`) while `docker ps` shows a **container** name (e.g. `entitlement-os-postgres`). Both refer to the same consolidated DB; always confirm live names on BG.
postgresql.remoteTcpNote: via `cloudflared access tcp` — see CLAUDE.md and docs/CLOUDFLARE.md

vercelAndAppEnv.description: Gateway identity for server-side calls from Vercel; values are secrets — names only here.
vercelAndAppEnv.equivalenceNote: On the gateway host, the same bearer value is often configured as GATEWAY_API_KEY or API_KEYS (comma-separated).
